injury_history.description: UCL Tear & Olecranon Stress Fracture. Tommy John Surgery + removal of fractured portion of olecranon, March 18 2025. 1 year post-op. Recovery had setbacks with shoulder pain and elbow flare-up (medial + olecranon pain). Currently throwing relatively pain free with recurring soreness at ~60% intensity.
injury_history.resolution: Tommy John surgery + olecranon fragment removal. Active rehab, progressive throwing program.
injury_history.ongoing_considerations: Forearm fatigues at high volumes/intensities. Tricep area pain near olecranon in non-throwing activities post-throw. Shoulder was tight early in throwing but improving.

injury_history.description: Shoulder pain during TJ rehab progression — currently much improved
Low back issues reported on intake
Forearm tightness recurring, especially at high throwing volumes
injury_history.ongoing_considerations: Fatigue at high volumes or intensities

mechanical_focus_areas: Keeping arm level with the shoulders are foot plant and stay there while rotating, currently struggling with dropping the elbow when I rotated putting extra stress on the elbow

goals.primary: Return back to throwing 100% pain free
